list.title: AI Agents
list.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
list.systemAgentLocked: System agents cannot be edited or deleted

delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this AI agent's function
form.avatarTip: Supports JPG, PNG format, max size 2MB
form.avatarTipFull: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG, max size 5MB
form.instructionsPlaceholder: You are a helpful AI assistant

model.title: Model Configuration
model.modelPlaceholder: Custom model name, leave empty to use default
model.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use global environment variable
model.apiKeyPerAgentHint: Set an API key for this agent only; leave empty to use the global environment variable
model.temperatureDescription: Controls output randomness. Lower values make it more deterministic, higher values make output more random. Recommended range: 0.0-1.0
model.temperatureRandomnessShort: Higher values make output more random; lower values make it more deterministic.
model.topPDescription: Controls sampling diversity, recommend adjusting with temperature
model.topPWithTemperatureHint: Controls sampling diversity. Prefer adjusting either this or temperature.
model.maxTokensDescription: Maximum tokens to generate, leave empty to use model default
model.maxTokensGeneratedShort: Maximum number of tokens to generate.
model.reasoningDescription: When enabled, AI will show detailed reasoning process. Requires model support
model.reasoningDescriptionAgent: When enabled, the agent shows detailed reasoning. Requires model support (e.g. Qwen3, qwen-plus).
model.thinkingBudgetDescription: Limits maximum tokens for thinking process, leave empty to use model's default
model.thinkingBudgetRangeHint: Max tokens for the thinking phase. Empty uses the model default max chain length. Suggested range: 512–32768

panel.selectPrompt: Select an AI agent from the list
panel.switchNote: When using a new AI agent, the conversation list will update automatically
panel.noAgentDescription: Select an agent from the list on the left to view details

tools.gotoMcp: Add tools on the MCP & Tools page

testChat.title: Test chat
testChat.emptyDescription: Send a message to test how this agent responds
testChat.hintKeys: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for newline
